title: Event Registry v1
description: Tier-1 NDJSON-safe registry schema for Event contract entries across the HorrorPlace constellation. Each object describes a single Event registry row that joins an eventContractCard into regions, invariants, metrics, and governance bands.

schema.description: Fixed schema URI for validator resolution.

version.description: Semantic version of this registry document.

events.description: Registered Event entries. In NDJSON mode, each line is a single entry that should validate against definitions.registryEntry.

invariantRequirementBand.description: Numeric band or inequality constraints for a single invariant (e.g., CIC, AOS, DET, SHCI) in 0.0–1.0 domain.

registryEntry.description: Single Event registry entry, suitable as a JSON object or NDJSON line.

eventId.description: Stable Event identifier referenced across the constellation (regions, seeds, personas, telemetry).

path.description: Repository-relative path to the Event contract JSON file (e.g., contracts/events/haunted-elevator.v1.json).

hash.description: Content hash of the Event contract payload, typically a SHA-256 hex digest used for reproducibility and Dead-Ledger proofs.

objectKind.description: Spine-defined object kind for routing and graph planning. For Events this is typically "eventContractCard" or a close variant.

tier.description: Governance tier for this Event record, aligned with constellation tiers.

safetyTier.description: Safety classification aligned with Charter and engine policies (e.g., exposure, gore constraints).

intensityBand.description: Coarse horror intensity band for this Event, aligned with entertainment-metrics spine bands (0–10).

deadLedgerRef.description: Optional Dead-Ledger reference for high-intensity Events. Required by CI when intensityBand exceeds configured public thresholds.

consentTier.description: Minimal consent/entitlement tier required to experience this Event (aligned with Dead-Ledger and consent envelopes).

eventType.description: Classification of Event behavior and intensity.

regionIds.description: List of region IDs where this Event is valid. Used for join validation and graph planning.

triggerConditions.description: Predicates for Event activation (e.g., timeOfDay, playerSanity, regionTags, previousEvents). Shape is intentionally open and enforced by higher-level contracts.

invariantRequirements.description: Required invariant ranges for this Event to be historically plausible. Keys are invariant codes; values are scalars or band/inequality objects in 0.0–1.0.

spectralAnchor.description: If true, Event may manifest spectral presence tied to historical trauma.

mythicDensityThreshold.description: Minimum MDI required for this Event to feel plausible at the region level.

archivalOpacityBonus.description: Amount to increase AOS if Event resolves ambiguously.

telemetryHooks.description: Entertainment metrics this Event is expected to emit telemetry for at runtime.

prismMetaRef.description: Reference to a prismMeta document describing linkage and dependency graph.

seedIds.description: Optional list of Seed IDs from Atrocity-Seeds that can trigger or host this Event.

styleIds.description: Optional list of style contract IDs (e.g., gore or atmosphere styles) referenced by this Event.

metricProfileId.description: Optional entertainment-metric profile ID describing intended UEC/EMD/STCI/CDL/ARR envelopes for this Event.

detBand.description: Optional Event-level Dread Exposure band, used by CI and runtime to enforce DET budgets.

min.description: Minimum DET in 0.0–1.0 domain for this Event to be considered eligible.

max.description: Maximum DET in 0.0–1.0 domain that this Event is allowed to reach.

intensityProfileId.description: Optional reference to a cross-stage intensity envelope profile reused by multiple Events.

status.description: Lifecycle status of this Event in the registry.

tags.description: Optional free-form tags for search, selectors, and routing (e.g., corridor, boss, systemic, ritual-bound).

notes.description: Optional short operator- or designer-facing note. Not interpreted by CI.
